Gantt chart¶

gantt title A Gantt Diagram dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD section Section A task :a1, 2021-01-01, 30d Another task :after a1, 20d section Another Task in Another :2021-01-12, 12d another task :24d First hiring target :milestone, 2021-06, 2021-06

EMERALD
